name: claude-kit
description: RMP Software's company-wide Claude Code tooling — shared skills, agents, and harnesses installable across every repo.

plugins.name: rmp
plugins.description: Spec-driven feature harness: write a spec, break it into Linear issues, then implement each sub-issue with an adversarial coder/reviewer split and hard evidence gates. Includes a generic, spec-driven compliance reviewer. Skills invoke as /rmp:<name>.

plugins.name: file-standard
plugins.description: Company-wide standard for where Claude-generated files live. A SessionStart hook injects the placement rules into every session and keeps the machine's global gitignore covering in-repo scratch; a non-blocking PreToolUse hook warns when scratch/evidence/handoff files are written outside .claude/scratch/. Keeps git trees clean by construction.
